spaceConfig.description: Configuration for a space managed by the simplespace implementation. A credential is minted only when the user is authorized by `mintPolicy` and their app by `appAccess`.

mintPolicy.description: How the authority decides whether to authorize a requesting user. 'member-list' (default) consults the member list, 'public' authorizes anyone, 'managing-app' asks the managingApp via checkUserAccess.

appAccess.description: How the authority decides whether to authorize a requesting app.

managingApp.description: Service identifier (e.g. did:web:example.com#forum) of the app that manages this space. Routes application-level requests and is the checkUserAccess target when mintPolicy is 'managing-app'.

open.description: App access policy: any app may access the space. No client attestation required.

allowList.description: App access policy: only the named clients may access the space, evaluated against the attested client_id.

allowed.description: The OAuth client IDs permitted to access the space.
